summary: Phase B Domain Module Separation - All 30 extracted endpoints validated. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Landing page, login, dashboard all working. The 4 new domain routers (Sales, Marketing/Events/Spa, Guest VIP, Check-in) maintain identical behavior to legacy_routes.py endpoints.
critical_code_review_comments: Domain routers successfully extracted with proper /api prefix and tags
Sales router (/api/sales/*) handles leads, funnel, activities correctly
Marketing router (/api/marketing/*) handles campaigns and segments
Guest router (/api/vip/list, /api/guests/{id}/vip-protocol, etc.) handles VIP management
Checkin router (/api/checkin/online) handles online check-in flow
Service router (/api/service/complaints) handles complaints - both POST (domain) and GET (legacy)
Router registry pattern correctly imports all domain routers in bootstrap/router_registry.py
All endpoints maintain identical response formats as legacy_routes.py

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Landing page, login, dashboard all working

seed_data_creation: Created test leads, campaigns, events, spa appointments, complaints with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase B domain extraction validated. 4 domain routers under backend/domains/ (channel_manager, guest, sales) are properly registered via router_registry.py. All endpoints return expected response formats. The GET /api/service/complaints endpoint is in legacy_routes.py while POST /api/service/complaints is in domains/sales/router.py - both work correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login - returns access_token with demo@hotel.com / demo123
POST /api/sales/leads - creates lead with contact_email, company_name
POST /api/sales/activity - logs activity with lead_id, activity_type, subject
POST /api/marketing/campaigns - creates campaign with name, subject, message
Frontend: Landing page loads with Giriş Yap button
Frontend: Login form accepts credentials and redirects to /app/dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows Welcome message, KPI cards (30 rooms, 30% occupancy, 73 check-ins, 50 guests)
Frontend: Analytics & Insights section visible with Occupancy and Revenue trends

domains/channel_manager/router.py.note: CM endpoints require API key authentication - tested separately
